summary: Horizon H23 (shell CI convergence terminal assurance): run-h23-assurance-bundle chains validate:shell-unified-dispatch-ci + run-h22-assurance-bundle; verify:sustainment-loop post-H23; verify:sustainment-loop:h22-legacy for post-H22 chain; goal-policy runway H2→H23.

nextActions.summary: Run unified-ci and confirm evidence artifact upload reliability and stage promotion gate signal emission.
Exercise operator retrieval and local verification flow against CI artifact bundle.
Promote H1 to completed once artifact retrieval and stage promotion gate workflow are verified.
Run canary promotion drill with passing readiness gate and capture stage-promotion execution evidence.
Run majority promotion readiness drill and confirm policy gate behavior under threshold breaches.
Validate rollback-trigger policy flow by simulating sustained SLO gate violation and proving Eve-safe restoration.
Run unified stage drill command for canary and majority paths so promotion and rollback policy evidence are emitted in one operation.
Run consolidated H2 drill suite command that emits canary hold, majority hold, and rollback-simulation evidence in a single report.
Support selectable evidence modes (`latest` vs `latest-passing`) across readiness, promotion, stage-drill, and h2 drill suite flows for deterministic operator replay.
Calibrate rollback-policy thresholds from recent validation summaries and capture machine-readable calibration evidence for operator replay.
Execute supervised rollback auto-apply simulation with calibrated thresholds and emit a unified evidence artifact verifying rollback trigger and Eve-safe shadow restoration.
Add an executable H2 closeout gate that validates H2-specific evidence artifacts (drill suite, threshold calibration, supervised rollback simulation) before promotion to H3.
Add a single-command H2 closeout runner that executes calibration + supervised rollback simulation + H2 closeout validation and emits one consolidated manifest.
Add a gated horizon promotion command that advances H2 to completed and H3 to active only when closeout evidence passes, with optional dry-run support.
Add a single-command H2 promotion runner that executes run:h2-closeout then promote:horizon using pinned closeout-run evidence for deterministic advancement to H3.
Enforce progressive horizon goal runway checks so each promotion can require the next horizon to carry more planned actions than the current horizon.
Harden runtime durability boundaries with persistent queue/replay semantics for cross-lane dispatch recovery.
Expand policy-router guardrails with stricter failure-class-to-action mappings and deterministic fallback contracts.
Implement capability execution safety envelopes with explicit timeout/resource budgets and auditable denials.
Add memory durability verification suite for crash/restart recovery and cross-lane consistency checks.
Create long-window soak validation for H3 policy and durability changes with explicit SLO drift alarms.
Introduce staged emergency rollback rehearsals for H3 changes with operator-ready evidence bundles.
Identify and deprecate direct Eve/Hermes invocation paths outside unified dispatch.
Remove compatibility shims that are no longer required by production integrations.
Freeze a versioned unified dispatch contract and publish upgrade notes.
Tenant isolation for routing ingress, capability policy, and memory namespaces with executable leak checks.
Region-aware standby routing swap with replay-safe envelopes and failover rehearsal manifest.
Bounded agent remediation playbook dry-run chaining tenant validation and region rehearsal artifacts.
Executable sustainment assurance bundle chaining horizon metadata validation, tenant isolation, region failover rehearsal, and unified entrypoint scan.
Extend horizon orchestration sequences and goal-policy defaults through H6 for promotion and audit tooling parity.
Document H6 sustainment expectations and CI evidence path for continuous assurance after full cutover.
Dispatch audit log size-based rotation with generation retention (UNIFIED_DISPATCH_AUDIT_ROTATION_MAX_BYTES / RETAIN_COUNT) applied before append in unified-dispatch.
H7 assurance bundle extends H6 gates with audit-log rotation unit proof; horizon orchestration extended through H7 with validate:h7-closeout and post-H7 sustainment loop manifest.
Goal policy and documentation parity for H6→H7 transition and terminal sustainment commands (verify:sustainment-loop).
Append-only capability policy authorization audit JSONL (traceId, capabilityId, allowed, policyReason) wired through UnifiedCapabilityEngine and unified-dispatch preflight.
H8 assurance bundle extends H7 with capability-policy-audit vitest; validate:h8-closeout and post-H8 sustainment loop manifest.
Goal policy H7→H8 transition and documentation for capability policy audit path and legacy sustainment npm aliases.
Atomic replace persistence for file-backed UnifiedMemoryStore (write temp JSON then rename) for crash-safe JSON snapshots.
H9 assurance bundle extends H8 with unified-memory-atomic-persistence vitest; validate:h9-closeout and post-H9 sustainment loop manifest.
Goal policy H8→H9 transition and documentation for atomic memory persistence and legacy sustainment npm aliases.
Configurable retention cap for dispatched/failed FileDispatchDurabilityQueue entries (default 5000; 0 = unlimited); pruning runs after each queue mutation.
H10 assurance bundle extends H9 with dispatch-durability-queue-retention vitest; validate:h10-closeout and post-H10 sustainment loop manifest.
Goal policy H9→H10 transition and documentation; verify:sustainment-loop now runs post-H10; verify:sustainment-loop:h9-legacy for prior chain.
Optional size-triggered rotation for capability policy audit JSONL (same archive naming as dispatch audit); wired through appendCapabilityPolicyAuditLog + UnifiedCapabilityEngine when max-bytes > 0.
H11 assurance bundle extends H10 with capability-policy-audit-rotation vitest; validate:h11-closeout and post-H11 sustainment loop manifest.
Goal policy H10→H11 transition and documentation; verify:sustainment-loop post-H11; verify:sustainment-loop:h10-legacy for prior chain.
Configurable max replay attempts per pending durability queue entry (default 0 unlimited); replayPendingDispatches fails stuck rows with replay_max_attempts_exceeded when attempts >= cap.
H12 assurance bundle extends H11 with dispatch-durability-queue-replay-limit vitest; validate:h12-closeout and post-H12 sustainment loop manifest.
Goal policy H11→H12 transition and documentation; verify:sustainment-loop post-H12; verify:sustainment-loop:h11-legacy for prior chain.
CI soak SLO drift gate: scripts/run-ci-soak-slo-gate.mjs runs soak-simulate then summarize-soak-report with UNIFIED_SOAK_FAIL_ON_DRIFT=1; writes evidence/ci-soak-slo-gate-*.json.
H13 assurance bundle chains run-h12-assurance-bundle + ci soak gate; validate:h13-closeout and post-H13 sustainment loop manifest.
Goal policy H12→H13 transition; unified-ci soak SLO step; verify:sustainment-loop post-H13; verify:sustainment-loop:h12-legacy for prior chain.
Canonical shell resolver unified-dispatch-runner.sh + validate-shell-unified-dispatch.sh; refactor soak/regression/cutover-readiness/failure-injection to use UNIFIED_DISPATCH_CMD.
H14 assurance bundle extends H13 with shell ingress gate; validate:h14-closeout and post-H14 sustainment loop manifest.
Goal policy H13→H14 transition; verify:sustainment-loop post-H14; verify:sustainment-loop:h13-legacy for prior chain.
CI static scan validate-shell-unified-dispatch-ci.mjs forbids scripts/*.sh from embedding dist paths or direct node/tsx unified-dispatch invocations outside unified-dispatch-runner.sh.
H15 assurance bundle extends H14 with shell CI scan; validate:h15-closeout and post-H15 sustainment loop manifest.
Goal policy H14→H15 transition; verify:sustainment-loop post-H15; verify:sustainment-loop:h14-legacy for prior chain.
H16 assurance bundle: H15 sub-bundle plus validate:goal-policy-file (H2→H22); manifest schema sweep moved to run-h21-assurance-bundle after validate:all.
validate:h16-closeout; post-H16 sustainment is legacy (verify:sustainment-loop:h16-legacy); terminal loop is post-H17.
Goal policy H15→H16 transition; run-h16-assurance-bundle uses validate:goal-policy-file H2→H17 before validate:all in CI.
run-h17-assurance-bundle: validate:merge-bundle + verify:merge-bundle --latest --no-require-archive; manifest schemas consolidated into run-h21-assurance-bundle.
post-H17 sustainment loop; verify:sustainment-loop; verify:sustainment-loop:h16-legacy for H16 chain.
Goal policy H16→H17 transition; unified-ci runs H17 bundle after initial-scope and before stage-promotion.
run-h18-assurance-bundle: H17 merge readiness plus stage-promotion-readiness (CI-aligned canary probe with allow-horizon-mismatch).
Legacy post-H18 sustainment (verify:sustainment-loop:h18-legacy); terminal loop is post-H19.
Goal policy H17→H18 transition; validate:goal-policy-file H2→H23; terminal closeout skips stage-promotion at H23.
run-h19-assurance-bundle: validate:horizon-status + run-h18-assurance-bundle; CI aligns sustainment with horizon metadata gate.
Legacy post-H19 sustainment (verify:sustainment-loop:h19-legacy); terminal loop is post-H23.
Goal policy H18→H19 transition; terminal closeout skips stage-promotion at H23.
run-h20-assurance-bundle: validate:evidence-gates + run-h19-assurance-bundle; ties validation-summary to failure-injection coverage.
Legacy post-H20 sustainment (verify:sustainment-loop:h20-legacy); terminal loop is post-H23.
Goal policy H19→H20 transition; terminal closeout skips stage-promotion at H23.
run-h21-assurance-bundle: validate:manifest-schemas + run-h20-assurance-bundle; terminal evidence manifest sweep after validate:all.
Legacy post-H21 sustainment (verify:sustainment-loop:h21-legacy); terminal loop is post-H23.
Goal policy H20→H21 transition; terminal closeout skips stage-promotion at H23.
run-h22-assurance-bundle: validate:unified-entrypoints + run-h21-assurance-bundle; terminal sub-chain before H23 shell CI gate.
run-h23-assurance-bundle: validate:shell-unified-dispatch-ci + run-h22-assurance-bundle; folds shell CI scan after validate:all + build.
post-H23 sustainment loop; verify:sustainment-loop; verify:sustainment-loop:h22-legacy for H22 chain.
Goal policy H22→H23 transition; terminal closeout skips stage-promotion at H23.

H1.summary: Operationalization baseline closed with passing unified CI, artifact upload reliability, and downloaded artifact verification workflow.

H2.summary: Cutover drills, rollback calibration, supervised simulation, closeout/promotion orchestration, and progressive goal gates delivered; operational baseline preserved for replay.

H3.summary: Durability queue and replay; fallback suppression by failure class; capability execution timeout; SerializedUnifiedMemoryStore; soak drift summarizer; emergency rollback rehearsal manifests.

H4.summary: Legacy retirement gates: validate-unified-entrypoints CI script, LEGACY_ENTRYPOINT_DEPRECATION_MAP, contract version constant v1 + fixture validation tests.

H5.summary: Tenant/region isolation, standby routing swap, bounded remediation playbook; closeout evidence via run-h5-closeout-evidence.mjs; CI gates validate:tenant-isolation + rehearse:region-failover.

H6.summary: Continuous assurance bundle (run-h6-assurance-bundle): horizon metadata + tenant isolation + region rehearsal; unified entrypoints enforced post-build in run-h22-assurance-bundle; documented in NEXT_LONG_HORIZON_ACTION_PLAN and CLOUD_AGENT_HANDOFF; H5->H6 goal policy in GOAL_POLICIES.json.

H7.summary: Audit lifecycle: dispatch audit JSONL rotation/retention in unified-dispatch; H7 assurance bundle adds audit-log rotation tests; terminal sustainment loop chains validate:h7-closeout; horizon tooling VALID_HORIZONS includes H7.

H8.summary: Capability policy authorization audit: append-only JSONL per @cap decision (default path beside dispatch audit); H8 assurance adds capability-policy-audit tests; VALID_HORIZONS H8; verify:sustainment-loop post-H8.

H9.summary: Crash-safe file memory: atomic rename commit for UNIFIED_MEMORY_STORE_KIND=file; H9 assurance adds unified-memory-atomic-persistence tests.

H10.summary: Durability queue lifecycle: bounded retention for dispatched/failed JSON queue entries (default max 5000); H10 assurance adds retention vitest.

H11.summary: Capability policy audit lifecycle: optional JSONL rotation aligned with dispatch audit naming; H11 assurance adds capability-policy-audit-rotation tests.

H12.summary: Durability queue replay guardrail: optional max replay attempts per pending entry; H12 assurance adds replay-limit tests; sustainment superseded by post-H14 terminal loop.

H13.summary: CI soak SLO drift gate: fail-closed summarize-soak-report after soak-simulate; H13 assurance bundles H12 + ci soak gate; unified-ci enforces soak thresholds; superseded by post-H14 sustainment.

H14.summary: Shell ingress convergence: unified-dispatch-runner.sh for soak/regression/cutover/failure-injection; H14 assurance adds validate-shell-unified-dispatch gate on top of H13 bundle.

H15.summary: Shell ingress via H14 only: run-h15-assurance-bundle chains H14; validate:shell-unified-dispatch-ci moved to run-h23-assurance-bundle after build.

H16.summary: Merge readiness policy gates: run-h16-assurance-bundle adds goal-policy validation H2→H23 + H15 chain; manifest schema sweep is in run-h21-assurance-bundle after validate:all.

H17.summary: Merge bundle assurance: run-h17-assurance-bundle (merge validate + verify); superseded as terminal chain by H18 bundle which adds stage-promotion readiness; manifest schemas folded into H21 terminal bundle.

H18.summary: Stage-promotion assurance: run-h18-assurance-bundle chains H17 merge gates + check:stage-promotion-readiness; superseded as terminal chain by H19 which folds validate:horizon-status into assurance.

H19.summary: Horizon metadata assurance: run-h19-assurance-bundle adds validate:horizon-status before H18 bundle; superseded as terminal chain by H20 which adds validate:evidence-gates.

H20.summary: Evidence-gates assurance: run-h20-assurance-bundle chains evidence-gates.mjs + H19 bundle; superseded as terminal chain by H21 which adds validate:manifest-schemas.

H21.summary: Manifest schema assurance: run-h21-assurance-bundle chains validate:manifest-schemas + H20 bundle; superseded as terminal chain by H22 which adds validate:unified-entrypoints.

H22.summary: Unified entrypoints sub-chain: run-h22-assurance-bundle chains validate:unified-entrypoints + H21 bundle; superseded as terminal chain by H23 which adds validate:shell-unified-dispatch-ci.

H23.summary: Shell CI convergence terminal assurance: run-h23-assurance-bundle chains validate:shell-unified-dispatch-ci + H22 bundle; terminal sustainment post-H23 via verify:sustainment-loop.

history.note: Manifest policy gate, operator merge-bundle verification, and horizon status schema gate implemented.
Stage promotion readiness gate added for cutover advancement decisions.
Promotion orchestration path added to gate readiness + apply stage in a single operator command.
Unified CI run 24959459587 passed fully and downloaded artifact set was locally verified for merge-bundle and stage-promotion readiness.
H1 closeout gate implemented and passing; active horizon advanced to H2 with explicit kickoff actions.
H2 initiated with canary/majority drill and rollback-policy validation actions.
Canary drill action completed; executing machine-evaluable auto-rollback policy gate for sustained SLO violations.
Unified stage drill executor added so one command runs promotion gating and auto-rollback policy evaluation with combined evidence output.
Added H2 drill suite runner to execute canary hold, majority hold, and rollback-simulation drills with a unified suite report artifact.
Added evidence-selection mode controls (`latest`, `latest-passing`) across promotion/readiness/drill flows to support deterministic replay against either strict newest or newest passing evidence.
Added rollback threshold calibration and supervised rollback simulation commands with machine-readable evidence outputs and test coverage for calibrated forcing + Eve-safe shadow restoration checks.
Added H2 closeout evidence validation for horizon-scoped required artifacts and a dedicated validate:h2-closeout command to gate H2->H3 readiness checks.
Added run:h2-closeout orchestrator to execute calibration + supervised rollback simulation + H2 closeout validation in one command and emit consolidated manifest evidence.
Added promote:horizon command to gate horizon advancement on closeout evidence and atomically update HORIZON_STATUS with dry-run support.
Added run:h2-promotion orchestrator to execute run:h2-closeout and promote:horizon in one command with pinned closeout-run handoff evidence.
Added progressive horizon goal-runway gate (`check:progressive-horizon-goals`) and optional promotion enforcement flags so each promotion can require larger next-horizon planning scope.
Added goal policy profiles and tagged H3 action runway so horizon promotion can enforce both runway growth and required capability categories.
Added goal-policy coverage gate for future horizon transitions and promotion enforcement flags so operators can require policy-backed progression beyond the immediate transition.
Added goal-policy readiness-audit gate integration so promotion flows can require both transition coverage checks and matrix-based readiness audits before advancement.

Implemented dispatch durability queue (JSON file, atomic writes), replay-safe dispatchUnifiedEnvelope path, CLI enqueue/replay flags, and config UNIFIED_DISPATCH_DURABILITY_QUEUE_PATH; marked h3-action-1 completed.

Merged durability + Hermes-primary allowlist streams; added RouterPolicyConfig.noFallbackOnFailureClasses and dispatch suppression via UNIFIED_ROUTER_NO_FALLBACK_ON_FAILURE_CLASSES; marked h3-action-2 completed.

H4 slice: UNIFIED_DISPATCH_CONTRACT_VERSION v1, LEGACY_ENTRYPOINT_DEPRECATION_MAP, validate-unified-entrypoints.mjs + CI, fixture test unified-dispatch-result-v1-pass.json; activeHorizon advanced to H4; H3 marked completed.

H5 slice: envelope tenantId/regionId; tenant dispatch allowlist/denylist; capability tenant allow/deny; TenantScopedUnifiedMemoryStore for capability execution; standby region lane swap; Eve/Hermes env passthrough; validate:tenant-isolation, rehearse:region-failover, agent-remediation-playbook; H4 marked completed.

H5 closeout: requiredEvidence scoped legacy gates to H1–H4; added h5-closeout-evidence; validate-horizon-closeout skips stage-promotion for terminal H5; promotionReadiness.targetStage full; run-h5-closeout-evidence.mjs aggregates bounded playbook manifest.

Post-H6 sustainment: run-post-h6-sustainment-loop emits checks.horizonStatusPass/h6AssuranceBundlePass/h6CloseoutGatePass; validate-horizon-closeout can evaluate post-h6 manifests when present (not requiredEvidence—avoid circular dependency with validate:h6-closeout inside the loop).

H7 audit lifecycle: audit-log rotation module + env-driven policy before append; run-h7-assurance-bundle and verify:sustainment-loop post-H7; tooling sequences extended through H7; terminal closeout skips stage-promotion at H7.
H8 capability policy audit trail: appendCapabilityPolicyAuditLog + UNIFIED_CAPABILITY_POLICY_AUDIT_LOG_PATH; run-h8-assurance-bundle; promote:sustainment-loop to post-H8; terminal closeout at H8.
H9 atomic file memory: FileUnifiedMemoryStore writes memory.json.tmp then renames to memory.json for crash-safe commits; run-h9-assurance-bundle + post-H9 sustainment; terminal closeout at H9.

H10 durability queue retention: prune oldest dispatched/failed entries after each mutation when UNIFIED_DISPATCH_DURABILITY_QUEUE_RETENTION_NON_TERMINAL_MAX is set (default 5000); run-h10-assurance-bundle + post-H10 sustainment; terminal closeout at H10.

H11 capability policy audit rotation: optional UNIFIED_CAPABILITY_POLICY_AUDIT_ROTATION_MAX_BYTES before each @cap policy append; run-h11-assurance-bundle + post-H11 sustainment; terminal closeout at H11.

H12 durability queue replay limit: optional UNIFIED_DISPATCH_DURABILITY_QUEUE_REPLAY_MAX_ATTEMPTS_PER_ENTRY caps replay attempts per pending row; run-h12-assurance-bundle + post-H12 sustainment; terminal closeout at H12.

Roadmap merged to main: H12 terminal horizon documented in NEXT_LONG_HORIZON_ACTION_PLAN (H12 section + post-H12 sustainment); CLOUD_AGENT_HANDOFF terminal closeout wording aligned (H5 retroactive skip references H12).
H13 CI soak SLO gate: run-ci-soak-slo-gate.mjs + run-h13-assurance-bundle; unified-ci soak drift step; terminal sustainment post-H13 via verify:sustainment-loop; H12->H13 goal policy.

H14 shell unified dispatch ingress: unified-dispatch-runner.sh + validate-shell-unified-dispatch.sh; soak/regression/cutover/failure-injection refactored; run-h14-assurance-bundle + post-H14 sustainment; H13->H14 goal policy.

H15 shell dispatch CI convergence: validate-shell-unified-dispatch-ci.mjs static scan; run-h15-assurance-bundle chains H14 + scan; verify:sustainment-loop post-H15; verify:sustainment-loop:h14-legacy; H14->H15 goal policy; terminal closeout at H15.

H16 merge readiness policy gates: run-h16-assurance-bundle chains H15 + validate:goal-policy-file (H2→H17) + validate:manifest-schemas; verify:sustainment-loop:h16-legacy for replay; H15->H16 goal policy.

H17 merge bundle assurance: run-h17-assurance-bundle after release-readiness + initial-scope (validate:merge-bundle + validate:manifest-schemas + verify:merge-bundle); unified-ci consolidates merge steps; verify:sustainment-loop post-H17; verify:sustainment-loop:h16-legacy; H16->H17 goal policy; terminal closeout at H17.

H18 stage-promotion operational assurance: run-h18-assurance-bundle chains H17 + check:stage-promotion-readiness (canary, allow-horizon-mismatch); verify:sustainment-loop post-H18; verify:sustainment-loop:h17-legacy; validate:goal-policy-file H2→H18; H17->H18 goal policy; terminal closeout at H18.

H19 horizon-status metadata assurance: run-h19-assurance-bundle chains validate:horizon-status + run-h18-assurance-bundle; verify:sustainment-loop post-H19; verify:sustainment-loop:h18-legacy; validate:goal-policy-file H2→H19; H18->H19 goal policy; terminal closeout at H19; unified-ci removes standalone validate:horizon-status.

H20 evidence-gates assurance: run-h20-assurance-bundle chains validate:evidence-gates + run-h19-assurance-bundle; superseded as terminal chain by H23 which adds validate:shell-unified-dispatch-ci via run-h23-assurance-bundle; verify:sustainment-loop:h20-legacy; validate:goal-policy-file H2→H23; H19->H20 goal policy; terminal closeout at H23.

H21 manifest schema assurance: run-h21-assurance-bundle chains validate:manifest-schemas + run-h20-assurance-bundle; superseded as terminal chain by H23 which adds validate:shell-unified-dispatch-ci; verify:sustainment-loop:h21-legacy; validate:goal-policy-file H2→H23; H20->H21 goal policy; terminal closeout at H23.

H22 unified entrypoints sub-chain: run-h22-assurance-bundle chains validate:unified-entrypoints + run-h21-assurance-bundle; superseded as terminal chain by H23 which adds validate:shell-unified-dispatch-ci; verify:sustainment-loop post-H22 is legacy (verify:sustainment-loop:h22-legacy); validate:goal-policy-file H2→H23; H21->H22 goal policy; terminal closeout at H23 when H23 is active.

H23 shell CI terminal assurance: run-h23-assurance-bundle chains validate:shell-unified-dispatch-ci + run-h22-assurance-bundle; verify:sustainment-loop post-H23; verify:sustainment-loop:h22-legacy; validate:goal-policy-file H2→H23; H22->H23 goal policy; terminal closeout at H23; H6–H12 bundles no longer duplicate validate:unified-entrypoints (H22 holds post-build gate).
